description: ## Component: hx-switch (UPGRADE) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries** Upgrade existing scaffold. Binary on/off toggle for settings and preferences. ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Properties control checked state. Default slot accepts label. ### API Design **Properties:** `name`, `value`, `checked`, `disabled`, `required`, `label`, `hx-size` (sm|md|lg) **Slots:** Default (label text), `help` **CSS Parts:** `switch`, `track`, `thumb`, `label` **Events:** `hx-change` (composed: true, detail: { checked }) ### Drupal Integration ```twig Enable appointment reminders Send SMS and email reminders 24 hours before appointments ``` ### ElementInternals: Submits value when checked ### Healthcare: Notification preferences, feature flags, consent toggles ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Visually distinct from checkbox (track + thumb design) 2. Smooth transition animation using design tokens 3. ElementInternals form participation 4. Keyboard: Space toggles 5. WCAG 2.1 AA: switch role
title: T1-12: hx-switch — Binary Toggle
